subject: 50 million women
body:
"More than 100 countries prohibit women from working in specific industries..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b06e4d5dee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 7, 2019
---
| | |
# 50 million women

**“More than 100 countries** prohibit women from working in specific industries, which means 2.7 billion women are legally restricted from having the same choice of jobs as men,” [Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67bbbe1bcf&e=3ee4985eea) writes in _The Wall Street Journal_ this week. In 18 countries, husbands can even legally prevent their wives from working and earning their own income, she adds.

**Expanding economic opportunity for women** isn’t just the right thing to do—it’s in America’s national interest, as well. It has the potential to boost global economic output by $12 trillion by 2025. Unleashing widespread prosperity throughout the developing world can lead to a more stable, peaceful global order.

**This afternoon** , President Donald J. Trump signed a memorandum to launch the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or “W-GDP.” Spearheaded by Ivanka Trump, this first-of-its-kind, whole-of-government approach to women’s economic empowerment will aim to touch 50 million lives in developing countries.

**That potential $12 trillion payoff** “represents far more than an economic boom—it represents millions of lives full of promise: mothers who could provide for their children, daughters who could be the first to graduate from high school, and young women who could start businesses and create jobs,” Ms. Trump writes.

**W-GDP stands** on a three-pillar premise:
1. Increase women’s global labor force participation and advancement in the workplace by providing them with quality education, training, and support

2. Improve the access that female entrepreneurs and business owners have to financing and market opportunities that help grow their businesses

3. Eliminate the legal, regulatory, and cultural barriers that prevent women from participating in their local economies

**“By investing in women** around the world, we’re investing in families, we’re investing in prosperity, and we’re investing in peace,” President Trump said.

[How W-GDP aims to reach 50 million women in the developing world by 2025](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e136098c7&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [Ivanka Trump previews the promise of W-GDP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c855f6fa3c&e=3ee4985eea)

body:
Since Kamala emailed you this morning, more than 35,000 people have signed
on in support of the Green New Deal. Our records show you haven’t signed
the petition yet -- but there’s still time to make your voice heard.

Add your name right now to show Kamala that you support the Green New Deal
to combat climate change.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1001&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]Add my name

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original message from Kamala Harris, February 7, 2019

I wanted to share some really important news with you this morning: today,
I’m proud to announce that I’ve signed on as an original co-sponsor of the
Green New Deal in the Senate.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1002&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]Add your name right now to stand with me in support of the Green New
Deal resolution to combat climate change and jump-start our economy.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1003&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]Add my name

For too long, we have been governed by lawmakers who are beholden to big
oil and big coal. They have refused to act on climate change. So it’s on
us to speak the truth, rooted in science fact, not science fiction.

Here’s the truth: climate change is real, and it is an existential threat
to our country, our planet, and our future. With each passing day, the
imminent threat of climate change grows -- and we see it in everything
from more instances of extreme weather to rapidly melting glaciers.

According to a harrowing report from the U.N. Intergovernmental Panel on
Climate Change, we have a shrinking window to take drastic action to cut
carbon emissions and make meaningful change to save our planet.

The Green New Deal is a bold plan to drastically shift our country to 100%
clean and renewable energy -- all while guaranteeing jobs to American
workers. We will repair our country’s crumbling infrastructure, upgrade
buildings across the nation, and dramatically cut greenhouse gas
emissions.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1004&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]We don’t have much time to make the urgent changes we need to protect
ourselves and our planet. Add your name right now to stand with me in
support of the Green New Deal.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1005&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]Add my name

Bold action takes bold leadership, and I’m grateful to Representative
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Senator Ed Markey for leading the charge on
this critical resolution.

We do not fight this fight for our generation alone -- but for generations
to come. Thank you for taking direct action today.

Sincerely,

— Kamala Harris

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/Green-New-Deal?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190207-lift-full&source=ema190207-lift-full&t=1006&akid=2754%2E5755789%2EV24hCR ]Add my name

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Stand FOR this at all costs
body:
| | Peter, Much of the news lately has been dominated by stories about newly empowered politicians ripping the mask off of their embrace of the culture of death. On Nancy Pelosi’s very first day as Speaker of the House, she sought to roll back pro-life policies. And she made it clear again this week that abortion is one of her top priorities when she brought the CEO of Planned Parenthood as her guest to the State of the Union. I’m sure I don’t need to remind you of what happened the moment secular liberals gained control of New York’s Senate. And other states like Virginia, Rhode Island, and New Mexico are trying to follow its lead by allowing babies to be aborted up to the moment of birth. And they are even allowing babies that have _already been born_ during abortion procedures to struggle for their lives while the parents and doctors debate whether to let them live. In response, Senator Sasse (R-NE) put forth the Born-Alive-Abortion-Survivors-Protection-Act to require medical care for babies born alive during failed abortions. But Senator Patty Murray (D-WA) blocked it. What has come of America?! We cannot allow the lie to continue that some lives just aren’t as valuable as others because of arbitrary standards or personal preferences. That is the logic of slavery. It is profane to suggest that one person could actually own another person and decide whether that person lives or dies. **[This must be stopped. Your donation to My Faith Votes today can make a difference.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190208apl01nd&n=1)** It’s absolutely astounding to me to see the people who are cheering, celebrating and congratulating themselves on these laws for their great “progressive” victory. There is nothing healthy or reproductively beneficial about killing a fully developed baby. And while they say it’s a woman’s “right to choose,” they deny the fact that she’ll carry the consequences of her choice for the rest of her life as well. I tell you all of this because we cannot sit on the sidelines. The left is advancing a culture of death and a God-less society. President Trump said it best in his State of the Union address, “Let us work together to build a culture that cherishes innocent life. And let us reaffirm a fundamental truth: all children \-- born and unborn -- are made in the holy image of God.” **_At My Faith Votes, our staff and directors have a plan to launch social media and other digital communication strategies to target pro-lifers and Christians and motivate them to get involved and ACT on their faith._** The mobilization campaign budget for this effort is $185,000 – but those are funds not presently available. Most of our donor partners think of us as only important during election season, and while we are providing critical leadership during that time, we have become a leading conduit for motivating and mobilizing Christians year-round. We can deploy the same effective tactics used during election season **_now_** to impact the deplorable legislative plague spreading across our nation and stop these life-killing bills being put forth. **[Please help us put this strategy into action](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190208apl01nd&n=2). **For the sake of our faith, our nation, and our children and grandchildren. We must PRAY, and we must ACT. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190208apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190208apl01nd&n=4)
---

name: Heather Gautney, Our Revolution
subject: Presidential candidates who signed on to Sanders' 2017 Medicare for All legislation are already backpedaling
body:
If Democrats are serious about defeating Donald Trump in 2020, they cannot continue to play footsie with drug and insurance companies and allow them to exploit our sick and our elderly.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c0/bed43eb/9e864790/75fbe3a2/4150126584/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c0/bed43eb/9e864790/75fbe3ad/4150126584/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-run?refcode=em190207-a-img&noskip=true")
Friends,
If Democrats are serious about defeating Donald Trump in 2020, they cannot continue to play footsie with drug and insurance companies and allow them to exploit our sick and our elderly.
Sen. Bernie Sanders, if he runs, would be the only presidential candidate who has taken on corporate health care profiteers on behalf of the working class and organized to pass Medicare for All through social movement pressure.
[**A $5 donation right now will give Our Revolution's grassroots army a head start if Bernie decides to run.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c0/bed43eb/9e864790/75fbe3ac/4150126584/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-run?refcode=em190207-a&noskip=true")
In the lead up to 2020, Democrats have put several health care plans on the table, all of them claiming to improve access to care. But making health insurance more affordable is not the same as guaranteeing healthcare for everyone. Sanders and Rep. Pramila Jayapal's plans are the only ones that will make health care truly universal.
The time for half-measures and empty promises is over. We need a leader with the political courage to demand health care for every single person in this country.
This won't come as a shock to many of you, but presidential candidates who signed on to Sanders' 2017 Medicare for All legislation are _already_ starting to backpedal on whether healthcare should be a public good.
Not only is it unethical to allow corporations to profit off our healthcare system, but the only way to cut costs is by taking it out of the hands of private insurers and allowing the government to negotiate prices. Sen. Sanders' Medicare for All treats people equally, regardless of income or employment status -- and not as a commodity to be exploited by private companies.

In solidarity,
Heather Gautney

subject: Join the Canary Club 2019

body:

| | Years ago, I attended a Worker's Memorial Day Event in Lorain, Ohio. A steelworker from Local 1104 gave me a gift -- a small, yellow pin depicting a canary. Coal miners used to bring canaries into the mines with them to detect poisonous gas. If the bird died, they knew to clear out. I've worn that pin on my jacket ever since. To me, the pin isn't just an accessory. It's a reminder of the steelworkers, miners, factory workers, and every person who puts in a long day's labor to make this country work. No matter your background or what work you do -- all work has dignity and should be respected and valued. **We have a lot of work to do in 2019 to make sure our policies reflect those principles.** Economic policies should reward work, not wealth. Someone who puts in 40 hours a week should not be living paycheck to paycheck. This is a team effort. I count on this movement to spread the message that all work has dignity. And to do that, we need a strong base of support that can only come from one place: you. **Peter, I'm asking you to become a part of the Canary Club 2019 -- a group of dedicated supporters who give a set amount, every month, to keep our operations going strong.** [**If you can, start your monthly contribution today. Committing to a gift of even $5 a month will help us plan and execute our efforts.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc04/4462dc26/8f72801d/201ed20b/1562373596/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190208?refcode=sbe190208_a&recurring=true") With gratitude, Sherrod P.S. If you haven't already, be sure to connect with us on [**Facebook**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc04/4462dc26/8f72801d/201ed20a/1562373596/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190208fba"), [**Twitter**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc04/4462dc26/8f72801d/201ed209/1562373596/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190208twa") and [**Instagram**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc04/4462dc26/8f72801d/201ed208/1562373596/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190208iga") to get the latest updates from my team and me.

subject: Border Agents Just Apprehended Convicted Child Molesters and an MS-13 Member at the Texas Border Where There's No Barrier
body:
"U.S. Border Patrol agents said Thursday that they apprehended several illegal immigrants at the southern border in Texas." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=857f9dc76a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Border Agents Just Apprehended Convicted Child Molesters and an MS-13 Member at the Texas Border Where There's No Barrier**

“U.S. Border Patrol agents said Thursday that they apprehended several illegal immigrants at the southern border in Texas, in places where there are no physical barrier walls to deter illegal crossings,” Eddie Scarry reports in the _Washington Examiner._

“Among those caught crossing into the U.S. were a Mexican man with a previous conviction in Georgia for child molestation, a Honduran man with a record in North Carolina showing a conviction for ‘Indecent Liberties with Child,’ and another Honduran male with a Florida record that identified him as a member of the violent MS-13 gang.”

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be37cd2ad2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump signed a new initiative Thursday to help bring economic security to 50 million women around the world by 2025, calling it a ‘historic step,’” Dave Boyer reports for _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2cd3a849f0&e=3ee4985eea)_. Led by Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump, the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP, is the first-ever whole-of-government approach focused on advancing women’s global economic empowerment.
---
|
---
| Throughout the 20th century, infrastructure was essential to growing America into one of the most powerful economies in the world. In Fox News, [Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3f69ab04a&e=3ee4985eea) writes that it’s time for both Democrats and Republicans to join with President Trump to fund infrastructure improvements. “Today, aging and insufficient infrastructure threatens to impede America’s economic growth and impact quality of life in many areas.”
---
|
---
| “Ford Motor Company announced Thursday it will invest $1 billion at two Chicago factories to handle production of three new SUVs. The company said in a news release that work on the assembly and stamping plants will begin in March and is expected to be completed by spring,” Brett Samuels reported in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=393a0763c8&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The expansion will result in 500 new full-time jobs, bringing total employment at the factories on the city's southeast side to 5,800.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Associated Press](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb28748d94&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Darlene Superville reports that First Lady Melania Trump “thanked youth anti-drug advocates Thursday for ‘choosing to step up and be part of the solution’ for reducing drug abuse and addiction.” The First Lady told attendees of the Community Anti-Drug Coalitions of America’s youth leadership forum that “you are our greatest agents for change.”
---
|

I knew the Democrats were out of touch, but this Green New Deal is proof they’re not thinking of the average American at all.

This new proposal — the first priority of the new liberal majority — is completely outrageous.

❌They want to limit what you drive.
❌They want to stop all air travel.
❌They want to give money to people “unwilling to work.”
❌They even want to monitor what you eat.

In fact, they’d prefer we all adopt a vegetarian diet immediately - so much so that they want a ban on all meat! The plan also pledges to gut and rebuild every building in America to meet new standards, ban all nuclear energy, guarantee a free education for life, and provide a home and income to every American - even those unwilling to work. In addition, the Green New Deal promises to eliminate 99% of cars and ALL air travel within the next ten years. (No, I’m not kidding.)

The answer is: They don't. But still, far too many people struggle every day to cover costs for the medicine they need. That's why one of my most important fights in Washington is to lower prescription drug prices -- we must value people first, not big pharma companies' profits. **Along with some of my Senate colleagues, I 'm backing the _CREATES Act_ , bipartisan legislation to stop brand-name pharmaceutical companies from blocking lower-cost generic drugs to market. This bill would help people get the life-saving medication they need at a lower cost.** **[We need 10,000 people to sign on today in support of lower-cost generic drugs. | **_Big Speeches, Big Solutions_** It’s the season for big speeches! Just a few weeks ago, **Governor Eric Holcomb** took to airwaves statewide to deliver his [State of the State address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb64b5759b&e=1acd9bb3d6). This week, **President Donald Trump** delivered his big [State of the Union address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f995cdb223&e=1acd9bb3d6). And in cities, towns, and counties across Indiana, local leaders have been delivering similar speeches providing the latest updates on their communities.

My favorite thing about these speeches is that they truly show the depth of bold solutions Republicans are bringing to the table to solve our biggest issues today. Here’s just a few we heard:
* **Governor Holcomb** is working to help local schools give much-deserving Hoosier teachers a raise by paying off a pension liability that schools are currently paying.
* **Governor Holcomb** is expanding infrastructure across Indiana, including working to accelerate the completion of I-69 by three years (completing it by 2024!) and bringing affordable broadband to unserved communities.
* **President Trump** signed a massive income tax cut for working American families, which has helped lead to record job creation, rising wages and a booming national economy.
* **President Trump** signed the First Step Act, which gives non-violent offenders the chance to re-enter society as productive, law-abiding citizens – reforming sentencing laws that have disproportionately harmed African-Americans.

And it’s the exact same thing for our local Republican elected officials. From **President Trump** , to **Governor Holcomb** and beyond, Republicans represent solutions. That’s why, here in Indiana, we call ourselves Indiana’s one and only Party of Purpose!

-Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:** _This week,**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** had the opportunity to join Marion County’s new Republican Party chairman, **Bryce Carpenter** , at a meet-and-greet during a joint meeting of the Downtown GOP and the Broad Ripple GOP in Indianapolis. _

| **_Indiana's Economy is AAA!_** More big news! We already knew that Indiana was the fiscal envy of the nation, but this week we received confirmation again from ALL THREE independent credit agencies. With **Governor Eric Holcomb’s** strong fiscal responsibility leading our state, they each [issued Indiana the highest possible credit rating](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dcfeef71e6&e=1acd9bb3d6) – AAA!

These ratings mean that Indiana is practicing the highest standards of fiscal integrity. A AAA credit rating truly is the hallmark indicator of being a good steward of Hoosier tax dollars.

**Governor Holcomb** said it best, "Maintaining our AAA credit ratings, having a balanced budget and continuing to have strong reserves are all key to keeping our economy growing."

clean_body: It’s the season for big speeches! Just a few weeks ago, Governor Eric Holcomb took to airwaves statewide to deliver his State of the State address... | | | | | | | | http:// | Big Speeches, Big Solutions It’s the season for big speeches! Just a few weeks ago, Governor Eric Holcomb took to airwaves statewide to deliver his . This week, President Donald Trump delivered his big . And in cities, towns, and counties across Indiana, local leaders have been delivering similar speeches providing the latest updates on their communities. My favorite thing about these speeches is that they truly show the depth of bold solutions Republicans are bringing to the table to solve our biggest issues today. Here’s just a few we heard: Governor Holcomb is working to help local schools give much-deserving Hoosier teachers a raise by paying off a pension liability that schools are currently paying. Governor Holcomb is expanding infrastructure across Indiana, including working to accelerate the completion of I-69 by three years (completing it by 2024!) and bringing affordable broadband to unserved communities. President Trump signed a massive income tax cut for working American families, which has helped lead to record job creation, rising wages and a booming national economy. President Trump signed the First Step Act, which gives non-violent offenders the chance to re-enter society as productive, law-abiding citizens – reforming sentencing laws that have disproportionately harmed African-Americans. And it’s the exact same thing for our local Republican elected officials. From President Trump , to Governor Holcomb and beyond, Republicans represent solutions. That’s why, here in Indiana, we call ourselves Indiana’s one and only Party of Purpose! -Kyle Hupfer PHOTO: This week,Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer had the opportunity to join Marion County’s new Republican Party chairman, Bryce Carpenter , at a meet-and-greet during a joint meeting of the Downtown GOP and the Broad Ripple GOP in Indianapolis. | | | | GOVERNOR HOLCOMB'S WEEK THAT WAS | | Indiana's Economy is AAA! More big news! We already knew that Indiana was the fiscal envy of the nation, but this week we received confirmation again from ALL THREE independent credit agencies. With Governor Eric Holcomb’s strong fiscal responsibility leading our state, they each – AAA! These ratings mean that Indiana is practicing the highest standards of fiscal integrity. A AAA credit rating truly is the hallmark indicator of being a good steward of Hoosier tax dollars. Governor Holcomb said it best, "Maintaining our AAA credit ratings, having a balanced budget and continuing to have strong reserves are all key to keeping our economy growing." | | | SECURE YOUR TICKETS: Trump Insiders to Headline 2019 Spring Dinner Secure your tickets now! name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm sick of writing these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We can't confirm another corporate polluter puppet.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a0cc/2f5ea88d/78d244fc/2cbde42e/1401818018/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/no-more-polluting-puppets?utm_source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&utm_campaign=08_bernhardt&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'm honestly tired of writing emails like this. This week, Trump made another polluted appointment to a position in his Cabinet. He appointed David Bernhardt, a former oil lobbyist, to head the Department of the Interior. And we got proof, once again, that giant polluting corporations are happily installing their puppets into positions of power. This has to stop. Climate change is the single greatest threat to our way of life, and we all know oil companies only care about their bottom line -- _not_ about protecting the health of our children and grandchildren. [**Tell the Senate right now: We cannot confirm _another_ corporate polluter puppet to control our country's natural resources!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a0cc/2f5ea88d/78d244fc/2cbde42e/1401818018/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/no-more-polluting-puppets?utm_source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&utm_campaign=08_bernhardt&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a0cc/2f5ea88d/78d244fc/2cbde42e/1401818018/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/no-more-polluting-puppets?utm_source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&utm_campaign=08_bernhardt&utm_medium=ema") Look, we know that President Trump's going to nominate puppets of powerful special interests to lead our government's most important agencies. That's not a surprise. The question is whether there are enough senators on both sides of the aisle who have the courage to finally stop Trump from selling our air and water to the highest bidder. We need to work together to stop our government from becoming one giant puppet show. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a0cc/2f5ea88d/78d244fc/2cbde42e/1401818018/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/no-more-polluting-puppets?utm_source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&source=ema_2019-02-08_bernhardt&utm_campaign=08_bernhardt&utm_medium=ema")
